title: The Hedgehog Concept
author: From: Good to Great
content: Focus only on what you can be the best in the world at, what drives your economic engine, and what you are passionate about.

title: Delegation by Objective
author: From: The Effective Executive
content: Delegate the 'what' and 'why,' but allow the person responsible to define the 'how.'

title: The Peter Principle
author: From: The Peter Principle
content: In a hierarchy, every employee tends to rise to their level of incompetence. Focus on constant skill acquisition to avoid this.

title: Situational Leadership
author: From: Leadership and the One Minute Manager
content: Adjust your leadership style based on the readiness and competence of the individual team member.

title: The Tyranny of the Urgent
author: From: The Tyranny of the Urgent
content: The urgent often crowds out the important. Discernment is the highest form of leadership.
